data.title: Trump doubles steel tariffs from 25% to 50%
data.description:
President Donald Trump announced on Friday that he will raise tariffs on steel imported into the United States from 25% to 50%, aiming to further protect American steelworkers. Speaking at a U. S. Steel facility in West Mifflin, Pennsylvania, Trump told an applauding crowd of employees that he had a “major announcement. ” He said the higher […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/trump-doubles-steel-tariffs-from-25-to-50/

data.title: Crypto Bulls See $644M Bloodbath As Bitcoin Dips Below $105,000
data.description:
Data shows a large number of long liquidations have occurred in the cryptocurrency market as Bitcoin and other assets have plunged. Crypto Liquidations Have Surpassed $712 Million Over The Past Day According to data from CoinGlass, chaos has occurred on the derivatives market following the volatility Bitcoin and the company have gone through during the last 24 hours. Related Reading: Bitcoin MVRV Ratio Signals Price Hot, But Not In Danger Zone Yet Below is a table that shows how the liquidations have looked for the cryptocurrency sector within this window. As is visible, almost $712 million in cryptocurrency contracts have seen forceful closure from their platform in the past day
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/bitcoin-news/crypto-bulls-644m-bloodbath-bitcoin-dips-105000/

data.title: REX Shares submits Solana and Ethereum staking ETF prospectus, expected to be listed in the US within weeks
data.description: Bloomberg analyst James Seyffart said on the X platform that REX Shares has submitted a prospectus for Solana and Ethereum collateralized ETFs, which are expected to be listed on the US market in the coming weeks. These funds are products under the 1940 Act and use a C-type corporate structure rather than the traditional 19b-4 process. "This may be a way to get some level of approval from the SEC." Seyffart pointed out that the ETF will obtain SOL and ETH spot exposure through a Cayman subsidiary, and said that "this is a series of clever legal and regulatory circumvention strategies used to bring these products to market." Seyffart also said: "Even if a more efficient structure emerges in the future, this may be the first way to go online."

data.title: NYC Comptroller knocks back Mayor Adams’ ‘dubious’ and ‘irresponsible’ Bitbond plan
data.description:

His stance directly opposes Mayor Adams, who is famous for his love of […]

data.title: Top French Soccer Club PSG Announces Bitcoin Accumulation One Day Before Champions League Final
data.description:
One of the biggest sports brands in the world is betting big on Bitcoin (BTC). Speaking at the Bitcoin 2025 Conference in Las Vegas, the head of Paris Saint-Germain (PSG) Labs, Pär Helgosson, claims that the Champions League final-bound French footballing giant is currently holding BTC.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/05/30/top-french-soccer-club-psg-announces-bitcoin-accumulation-one-day-before-champions-league-final/
